content.en:
"Senior, I already have a teacher, and I don't want to apprentice again!"

Han Xuan said this, hoping to dispel Ye Tian's idea of accepting apprentices.

"Master, it doesn't matter, I have also had many masters on my cultivation path, this is not a conflict!" Ye Tian said.

“......"

Han Xuan was speechless.

She obviously refused to say this, Ye Tian even wanted to accept apprentices.

"Senior, I really don't want to apprentice!"

Han Xuan said.

"I'm strong!" Ye Tian smiled and said, "This middle origin domain you are in may be destroyed by a powerful origin ancestor battle one day, worship me as a teacher, I can guarantee your safety!"

"How strong are you?"

Han Xuan asked curiously.

She is very weak now, so she can't see through Ye Tian's cultivation.

"Half-step Sixfold Primordial Ancestor is invincible!"

Ye Tian said.

"Half-step Sixfold Ancestor is invincible?"

Han Xuan thought that Ye Tian was boasting, and the half-step sixfold ancestor might be true, but the invincible was probably boasting by himself.

However, the strongest person in this middle primordial domain is also estimated to be only a three- or fourth-tier primordial ancestor, and Ye Tian is a half-step sixth-fold primordial ancestor realm, which is indeed very powerful.

But, for her, that's it.

However, there is one thing Ye Tian said is very right, it will take a long time for her to grow up, and if there is a powerful ancestor fighting here, she may really be affected.

When the time comes, she will definitely die!

In the primeval realm, it would indeed be safe to have a half-step sixfold ancestor to protect it.

"I'm willing to apprentice!"

Han Xuan said.

After a simple apprenticeship, Ye Tian officially subordinated Han Xuan.

Of course.

Ye Tian didn't bring Han Xuan into the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, but instructed Han Xuan in this Medium Origin Domain.

At first, Han Xuan didn't care about Ye Tian, but after a period of getting along, she found that her cheap master was very demonic, and any kind of extreme way could guide her.

Moreover, no matter how many extreme extreme paths she comprehended, she couldn't hide from this master.

As the years passed, Han Xuan gradually grew to the realm of the perfect controller, and soon became the perfect controller of the virtual realm, and she also comprehended many extreme paths.

this day.

The two Fivefold Origin Ancestors broke into this middle primordial domain, and a battle broke out, Ye Tian directly shot and killed the two of them in seconds.

This is just a small episode.

Another time passed.

Han Xuan finally grew to the realm of a heavy ancestor, and the speed of growth was many times faster than Ye Tian's beginning, mainly because Han Xuan was not short of resources, and her own heritage was too strong, so she could easily become a first ancestor.

Ye Tian didn't feel strange at all about this.

And the first ancestor to the third ancestor is not difficult, with Han Xuan's background, she will naturally be able to arrive soon, but what kind of systematic inscription technique should she cultivate, Ye Tian has to talk to her.

"Han Xuan, what inscription technique do you want to break through to the Triple Ancestor?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Master, I once accidentally obtained an inscription technique, and I am ready to break through with this inscription technique!" Han Xuan hesitated for a moment and said.

"Oh, what inscription?"

Ye Tian asked.

"The Golden Lotus Inscription Technique contains three hundred and sixty-five extreme paths!"

Han Xuan said.

"The Golden Lotus Inscription Technique, it's okay, then use this Inscription Technique to break through!" Ye Tian said.

He guessed that this kind of inscription technique should be the inscription technique that Han Xuan had obtained by herself in her previous life, and it might even be the inscription technique she had cultivated in her previous life, and it involved three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, which were at the same level as the Primordial Zhou Tiantu, so he wouldn't have taught the Primordial Zhou Tiantu!

Moreover, he finally knew Han Xuan's plan now.

"Han Xuan definitely didn't condense three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths in his previous life, so he wanted to rebuild and forge the strongest foundation!" Ye Tian said darkly.

can condense three hundred and sixty-five kinds of extreme extreme paths, and take this path, it takes too many resources, he is open, and there are many resources, all of which have exhausted resources.

And Han Xuan, why?

Unless she had prepared the resources in her previous life, she could go and get them?

"There is such a possibility, but it is not very likely, unless she can determine the location of the reincarnation, and it is placed nearby, if it is too far, the cultivation is insufficient, and she will not be able to go at all. "

Ye Tian didn't think much about it, and tried his best to cultivate Han Xuan.

Moreover, he occasionally looks for resources, after all, he needs a lot of resources in the future.

Time passed slowly, and not long after, Han Xuan broke through to the peak realm of the Origin Ancestor Double, and was only one step away from the Origin Ancestor Triple.

At this time, she began to practice the Golden Lotus Inscription Technique, inscribed all kinds of extreme extreme paths on the Pagoda of Will.

It didn't take long for her to step into the realm of the Triple Ancestor.

However, after reaching the Triple Origin Ancestor realm, she could not improve quickly, and her cultivation could be used to accumulate resources and quickly ascend to the Triple Origin Ancestor peak realm.

However, if she wanted to condense the three hundred and sixty-five layers of the Will Pagoda, complete her cultivation of the Golden Lotus Inscription Technique, comprehend the three hundred and sixty-five extreme paths, and engrave them all on the Will Pagoda, this step was extremely difficult!

"In my previous life, I only comprehended a total of 272 extreme extreme paths, and it is not difficult to comprehend these two hundred and seventy-two extreme extreme paths, but it is too difficult to comprehend the other extreme extreme paths one by one!"

Han Xuan muttered.

However, after her reincarnation this time, her talent has improved a lot, and it is not hopeless.

She is going to spend countless years slowly boiling up, and only by comprehending the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extremes can she do that thing in the future!

Another long period of time passed, and with the help of Ye Tian, Han Xuan's cultivation had been promoted to the peak realm of the Triple Primordial Ancestor, and she had already comprehended all the two hundred and seventy-two extreme extreme paths she had comprehended in her previous life, but it was too difficult to comprehend the two hundred and seventy-third extreme extreme paths!

this day.

She met with Master Ye Tian again, and Ye Tian wanted to guide her again.

"Two hundred and seventy-two extreme extremes, very good!"

Ye Tian said approvingly.

Swish!

Han Xuan's face changed, she tried her best to hide it, and the master could even see it, the half-step sixfold ancestor could do this? What are you kidding!

The point is, she had only cultivated for such a short period of time, and she had comprehended two hundred and seventy-two extreme extreme paths, how could the master not doubt it?

After all, it's impossible to do it with normal cultivation!

"Master, do you see that?"

Han Xuan asked nervously.

"Of course!" Ye Tian smiled and said: "You don't have to be nervous, you are my disciple, you have comprehended two hundred and seventy-two extreme extreme paths, I have long known that you are a reincarnated person, although I don't know how you did it, but two hundred and seventy-two extreme extreme paths should be the limit of your previous life, you want to hit the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths in this life!"
